item.title: Talk of AI disruption, wars, oil and rates dominates M&A conference even as deals soar
item.description: The value of dealmaking is close to all-time highs, even as corporate executives struggle to navigate вҖҢthe Trump administration's tariffs, wars on multiple continents and how artificial intelligence will shape the economy in the years ahead.

item.title: How US regulators are overhauling bank capital rules
item.description: U.S. banking regulators on Thursday unveiled sweeping plans to streamline and ease numerous capital requirements for the nation's largest banks, which could free up billions of dollars for lending, dividends and share buybacks.

item.title: Ecolab nearing deal to acquire KKR's data center cooling company for up to $5 billion, WSJ reports
item.description: Ecolab вҖӢis nearing a вҖҢdeal to acquire data center cooling company вҖӢCoolIT Systems from вҖӢKKR for between $4.5 billion вҒ and $5 billion, the вҖӢWall Street Journal reported вҖӢon Thursday, citing people familiar with the matter.

item.title: US fixed 30-year mortgage rate hits three-month high amid Iran war
item.description: The average rate on the popular U.S. 30-year fixed-rate mortgage вҖӢsurged to a three-month high вҖҢthis week as war in the Middle East stoked inflation fears, dealing a blow вҖӢto the Trump administration's efforts вҖӢto make housing more affordable.

item.title: Apple fends off bid for new Apple Watch import ban at US trade tribunal
item.description: A U.S. trade tribunal preliminarily ruled that Apple's current Apple Watches do not infringe patents owned by Masimo , rejecting the medical-monitoring company's bid for вҖӢa renewed import ban on the tech giant's smartwatches.

item.title: IMF says prolonged increase in energy prices could boost inflation, lower growth
item.description: The IMF on Thursday said it was closely monitoring developments in the Iran war and the вҖӢresulting disruptions to energy production, warning that prolonged increases in energy вҖҢprices could boost inflation and lower growth globally.

item.title: Cloud industry group calls for EU interim measure against Broadcom over VMware
item.description: Lobbying group Cloud Infrastructure Services Providers in Europe on Thursday urged EU вҖӢantitrust regulators to temporarily stop Broadcom from ending вҖҢits VMware Cloud Service Provider programme in Europe, ramping up its fight against the U.S. tech company.

item.title: Explainer: How important is food to Unilever?
item.description: Unilever shares were down on Thursday, extending losses from Wednesday after a report the company may spin off its food business, and had held merger talks with Kraft Heinz that have ended.

item.title: US wholesale inventories fall sharply in January
item.description: U.S. wholesale inventories dropped sharply January, a trend that if sustained could вҖӢresult in inventory investment being a drag вҖҢon economic growth in the first quarter.

item.title: US new home sales drop to near 3-1/2-year low in January
item.description: Sales of new U.S. single-family homes fell more than expected in January, hitting their lowest level in nearly 3-1/2 years, likely weighed down by harsh winter weather.

item.title: Big central banks keep options open as traders suspect war will bring rate hikes
item.description: Nearly all major developed market central banks kept rates unchanged this week, but emphasised their readiness to act to curb inflation should the energy shock caused by the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran drive a broader surge in вҖӢprices.

item.title: WInklevosses' Gemini Space Station sued by shareholders over strategy shift, losses, departures
item.description: Gemini вҖӢSpace Station and its billionaire founders Cameron and Tyler Winklevoss вҖҢwere sued by shareholders who said they were defrauded about the cryptocurrency exchange's business prospects, and suffered losses as a strategy shift, mounting losses, job вҖӢcuts and executive departures caused the stock price to fall.

item.title: US extends protection of Venezuela-owned Citgo from creditors
item.description: The вҖӢUnited вҖҢStates has extended вҖӢa вҖӢlicense that вҒ protects вҖӢVenezuela-owned refiner вҖӢCitgo Petroleum from вҖӢcreditors вҖӢthrough May 5, вҖҢaccording вҒ to a posting вҖӢon вҖӢThursday вҒ on the вҖӢTreasury вҖӢDepartment's вҒ website.

item.title: OpenAI to buy Python toolmaker Astral to take on Anthropic
item.description: The ChatGPT вҖӢowner is looking to strengthen its portfolio against вҖҢits rival.

item.title: Exclusive: India's proposal to preload national ID app Aadhaar on phones faced pushback
item.description: India's government privately proposed in January that firms like Apple, Samsung and Google consider pre-installing its biometric вҖӢidentification app Aadhaar on phones, a move opposed by a group representing the smartphone giants, industry letters show.

item.title: World trade growth set to slow to 1.9% this year, Iran war may weigh more, says WTO
item.description: Growth in world trade in goods will slow down markedly to 1.9% this вҖҢyear from 4.6% in 2025 and could decelerate even more if the Middle East war continues to push energy prices higher and disrupt global transport, a World Trade Organization report said on Thursday.

item.title: Another oil price jump further pushes out Fed rate-cut odds
item.description: The вҖӢshift in the geopolitical outlook has pushed major central banks into a cautious stance.

item.title: Samsonite shareholders approve US dual listing
item.description: Samsonite shareholders on Thursday approved a вҖӢset of resolutions вҖҢdesigned to pave the way for вҖӢa U.S вҖӢdual listing, as the вҒ Hong KongвҖ‘listed вҖӢluggage maker seeks greater вҖӢexposure to U.S. investors and improved share вҖӢliquidity.

item.title: Google expands utility deals to curb dataвҖ‘center power use during peak demand
item.description: Google has signed agreements with five U.S. electric utilities in states from Arkansas to Minnesota to curtail its вҖӢelectricity use during periods of peak demand, the company said on вҖҢThursday, in its latest effort to secure power for fastвҖ‘growing data centers amid slow additions of new supply.

item.title: Xiaomi to invest at least $8.7 billion in AI over next three years, CEO says
item.description: Xiaomi вҖӢwill invest вҖҢat least 60 billion вҖӢyuan ($8.70 вҖӢbillion) in artificial вҒ intelligence вҖӢover next вҖӢthree years, CEO Lei Jun вҖӢsaid вҖӢon Thursday.

item.title: Italian court scraps 15-million-euro privacy watchdog fine on ChatGPT-maker OpenAI
item.description: A Rome court has cancelled a 15вҖ‘millionвҖ‘euro ($17 million) fine вҖӢthat Italy's data protection authority вҖҢimposed on ChatGPT maker OpenAI, a ruling showed on Thursday.

item.title: Lanxess raises chemical prices to counter effects of Iran war
item.description: Lanxess said it was raising chemical prices to counter the effects of the Middle East conflict, after the вҖӢspeciality chemicals maker reported annual results and announced job cuts вҖҢearlier on Thursday.

item.title: Exclusive: 'No winners' in Middle East crisis, airlines body chief says
item.description: The widening conflict in the Middle East will push up airline ticket prices and leave "no winners," Willie Walsh, head of the International Air вҖӢTransport Association told Reuters on the sidelines of an вҖӢairline event in Brussels on Thursday.

item.title: Legal data company Relativity confidentially files for US IPO
item.description: Legal data company Relativity said вҖӢon Thursday it had вҖҢconfidentially filed for an initial public offering in the вҖӢU.S.

item.title: US weekly jobless claims unexpectedly fall amid low layoffs
item.description: The number of Americans filing new applications for unemployment benefits unexpectedly fell last week, pointing to stable labor market conditions and a rebound in job growth in March.

item.title: Energy prices surge as Iran targets Gulf energy facilities after Israel struck its key gas field
item.description: European gas prices rose вҖӢ28% and oil gained 6% after Iran attacked energy infrastructure in the Middle East in retaliation against Israeli attacks on it gas facilities, marking the biggest escalation of the вҖҢnearly three-week war.

item.title: Uber to invest up to $1.25 billion in Rivian as part of robotaxi deal
item.description: Uber will invest вҖҢup to $1.25 billion in electric vehicle maker Rivian as part of a deal in which the ride-hailing firm will start deploying 10,000 fully autonomous R2 SUVs as robotaxis from 2028, the companies вҖӢsaid on Thursday.

item.title: UBS CEO attacks 'fearmongering' over bank regulations
item.description: Much of the trust Switzerland gained from mastering the Credit Suisse crisis three years ago has been вҖӢjeopardised by focusing too much on risks and fears вҖҢin the ensuing regulatory debate, UBS CEO Sergio Ermotti said on Thursday.

item.title: Freeport to seek permit for $7.5 billion mine expansion, Chilean media reports
item.description: U.S. miner Freeport-McMoRan is due to вҖӢbegin the process of вҖҢobtaining an environmental permit for a $7.5 billion expansion of вҖӢits El Abra copper вҖӢmine in Chile, newspaper Diario вҒ Financiero reported late Wednesday.

item.title: UK regulator probes Adobe over cancellation fees concerns
item.description: Britain's вҖӢcompetition вҖҢregulator has вҖӢlaunched вҖӢan investigation into вҒ Photoshop вҖӢmaker вҖӢAdobe to examine вҖӢwhether вҖӢits early cancellation вҖҢfees вҒ were unfair and вҖӢmisleading, вҖӢthe вҒ watchdog вҖӢsaid вҖӢon вҒ Thursday.
